features.name: throughout sequence operator in property assertion
features.description: Code should include a throughout operator used within a sequence expression in an assert property, where a boolean condition holds true at every clock tick during sequence evaluation
features.snippet:
logic cond, a;
assert property (@(posedge clk) a |-> (cond throughout (1'b1 ##3 1'b1)));

features.name: sequence delay operator with concatenation
features.description: Code should include a sequence expression using the ## delay operator with concatenation literals

features.name: property assertion with clocking and implication
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with clocking control and sequence implication operator
